title: Xogta Ganacsiga Bulshada
subtitle: Ku xidh TikTok Shop, Instagram Shopping, ama Pinterest si aad u la socoto heerarka beddelka, calaamadaha baahida, iyo badeecadaha viral noqonaya — ka hor inta aysan dhammaan.
tipLabel: 💡 Ma hubtid meesha aad ka heli karto access token-kaaga? Weydii AskBiz:
tipPrompt: Sideen u helaa access token-ka TikTok Shop si aan ugu xidho AskBiz?
tiktokDesc: Dalabyada, xogta, waxqabadka fiidiyowga, heerarka beddelka
instagramDesc: Fahamka boostada, kaydinta, gujimada badeecada, dalabyada iibka
pinterestDesc: Xogta Pin, kaydinta (calaamadaha baahida), buugga badeecadaha
demandDetected: {n} calaamad baahi ah oo la ogaaday
demandDetected_plural: {n} calaamadood baahi ah oo la ogaaday
demandBody: {productName} wuxuu haystaa {saves} kaydin oo {platform} ah balse weli dalab ma jiro — niyad iibsi xoog badan. Hubi heerkaaga kaydka oo hubi in ay fududahay in la iibsado.
demandAskLink: Weydii AskBiz sida kaydinta loogu beddelo iib →
demandAskPrompt: Waxaan haystaa {saves} kaydin oo {platform} ah oo “{productName}” balse dalab ma jiro. Maxaan sameeyaa si aan kuwan ugu beddelo iib?
analysePlatformPrompt: Falanqee waxqabadkeyga {platform}. Waxaan haystaa {views} daawasho, {saves} kaydin, {orders} dalab, iyo {revenue} dakhli ah 30-kii maalmood ee la soo dhaafay. Maxaan sameeyaa si aan u hagaajiyo heerka beddelkeyga {rate}%?
noContentYet: Weli xog waxyaabeed ma jirto. Isku xidh baraahaaga si aad u aragto waxqabadka boostada.
analyseContentPrompt: Iiga sii sheeg wax badan {platform} {contentType} ee “{productName}”. Wuxuu haystaa {views} daawasho, {saves} kaydin, iyo {orders} dalab. Sideen ku celin karaa guushan?
noSignals: Ma jiro calaamad baahi ah oo la ogaaday
noSignalsSub: Dhammaan badeecadaha kaydin sare leh waxay u beddelayaan dalabyo.
convertSalesPrompt: “{productName}” wuxuu haystaa {saves} kaydin oo {platform} ah balse 0 dalab. Waa maxaa sababaha ugu badan iyo maxaan isla markiiba sameeyaa si aan kaydintan ugu beddelo iib?
checkStockPrompt: Hubi heerkeyga kaydka ee “{productName}” — waxaan helayaa {saves} kaydin oo {platform} ah waxaanan filayaa in baahidu kor u kacdo. Kayd igu filan ma haystaa?
